prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOSOGPRBS1FT-100F-OLVDRBGRN Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Survival 550 Type III Mil-Spec Tactical Paracord Rope OD Green - 100ft Description: The ASR Outdoor Survival 550lbs Tactical Paracord Rope is a US Military Mil-Spec Type III cord in accordance with specification MIL-C-5040H. This 550 Type III Parachute Cord a must-have key component for every day carry to all survival kits, bug out bags, camping essential kits and even hiking gear alike, as you never know what might pop up on you in the great outdoors. Available in a wide ride of patterns, from wildness camouflage to bright and reflective, easy to spot rescue colors.

All ASR Outdoor 550 Tactical Paracord is made from 7 Stands of 100% Nylon genuine Mil-Spec 550lb parachute cord. The same stuff used by the US Military. It has a breaking strength of 550lbs with a working load of 220lbs. The overall thickness of the parachute cord line is 5/32" diameter and has a consistent stretch of 10% elongation underweight in lab tests.

The ASR Outdoor Survival 550lbs Tactical Parachute Cord is extremely strong while being lightweight and compact. Available in multiple lengths up to 500 feet there is an option that is right for your prepper, survival, or boy scout needs. Genuine Military Grade Tactical Paracord is versatile and handy. Designed to take a beating and keep on working, never leave home without it.

Beef up your bug out bag with the ASR Outdoor Survival 550 Type III Mil-Spec Tactical Paracord Rope. Search Terms: 550lb paracord braclet kit survival outdoor emergency edc camping gear type iii 7 strand parachute cord mil spec rope preparedness Features: - WHEN RELIABILITY IS ESSENTIAL: ASR Outdoor Survival 550 Paracord s ideal for securing structures, Splinting or creating a sling for an injury, Makeshift Stretcher, Tourniquet, or Rescue Line (drowning/quicksand) - SPECIFICATIONS: Built to Military Specifications MIL-C-5040H for Type III 550 Parachute Cord it has a breaking strength of 550lbs and a working tensile load of 220lbs in lab test. The overall thickness of the parachute cord line is 5/32" diameter and has a consistent stretch of 10% elongation - UNIVERSAL APPLICATION: Available in multiple lengths up to 500 feet there is an option that is right for your prepper, survival, or boy scout needs. Genuine Military Grade Tactical Paracord is versatile and handy. Designed to take a beating and keep on working, never leave home without it - TRAVELING USES: Snow Shoes, Tether Yourself to Your Bug Out Bag, Trail Markers, Across Stream Guide, Create a raft, Hauling (Dragging Gear, Timber Hitch), or Hold More Survival Gear - EVERYDAY USES: Secure a Tent, Tarp, Hammock, Bow Drill, Repair Torn Clothing, Emergency Belt/Bracelet, Make a Strong Rope, Rope Ladder, Pet Collar / Leash, Shoelaces /Replace Broken Drawstrings, Hang Tools From Belt, or Dental Floss === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100ft OD Green 550 Type III Paracord Rope

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100-ft OD Green 550 Type III Paracord Rope

anthropic.title_differentiation: Mil-Spec MIL-C-5040H, 550Lb Breaking Strength, 7 Strand Nylon, Military Grade, Survival And Emergency EDC

openai.title_differentiation: US Military Spec, 7 Strand All Nylon, 550 Lb Break Strength, 220 Lb Working Load, 532" Diameter
